completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation requirements for 12 project types
Classified as monorepo with 6 apps + 17+ shared libs. Parts: client (Angular), server (Express), desktop (Electron), agentos (Kotlin)
Found 30+ existing documentation files across docs/ (user guides, configuration, study notes, legacy to-rework docs)
Tech stack: TypeScript 5.9.3, Angular 20.3.4, Express 5.1.0, Electron 38.3.0, NX 22.2.3, pnpm workspaces, Jest/Playwright, AI SDKs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google), MCP
Quick scan conditional analysis: 10 API route files detected in server, 10 integration adapters, 6 handler implementations, migration system found
Source tree documented with annotated directory structure, critical folders, entry points, and cross-part integration points
Development guide written: prerequisites, install, run/build/test commands, code conventions, CI/CD (GitHub Actions release.yml + validate.yml)
Architecture document written covering layered architecture, tech stack, API design, component overview, data architecture, testing, deployment
Supporting docs: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development-guide.md all written
Master index.md generated with links to all generated and existing documentation
Validation complete. All generated files present, no incomplete markers found

findings.project_classification: NX-based TypeScript monorepo with Angular frontend, Express backend, Electron desktop, and Kotlin AgentOS service
